name: Tech Golf
address: 325 Emmett Ave Unit L, Bowling Green, KY 42101
about: Tech Golf of Bowling Green is the city's first and only indoor golf simulation facility, offering a climate-controlled environment for year-round play. The venue provides a range of experiences from individual practice and simulator gameplay to group events and parties in their renovated Par-Tee Room. Available by appointment only, the facility features TruGolf simulators with high-speed camera technology and E6 CONNECT software for an immersive golf experience across nearly 100 virtual courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Climate-controlled indoor facility open year-round regardless of weather
Advanced TruGolf technology with real-time swing analysis and course accuracy
Versatile venue space that accommodates both individual practice and group events

food_and_drink.notes: Par-Tee room available for events with kitchen facilities including fridge and microwave
No mention of alcohol service available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Utilizes high-speed camera technology for ball and club data capture

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a kitchen and bar top area in the VIP simulator room, but no clear policy on outside food/drinks is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't provide specific timing for 18 holes, as sessions are booked in 30-minute or 1-hour increments per person.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children under 5 are free, and the venue appears to accommodate families with various age groups.
